metadata.description: Multi-tentacled orchestration plugin for Claude Code

plugins.name: octo
plugins.description: v9.6.1 - Enhanced HUD with rate limit tracking, agent trees, and configurable columns. Async statusline with 5h/7d usage from Anthropic OAuth API, cache hit rate, version check, transcript-based agent tracking, Tailwind color palette, vertical/horizontal layouts. 32 personas, 40 commands, 50 skills. Run /octo:setup.
